This Privacy Notice ("Notice") sets out the basis which ACLEDA Bank Plc. ("we", "us", or "our") may collect, use, disclose or otherwise process CUSTOMER's ("you", or "your") personal data in accordance with our internal data protection policy. This Notice applies to personal data we collect from you when you use our website.

Definition of "Personal Data"Personal Data / Personal Information means data, whether true or not, about a customer/an individual who can be identified: (a) from that data; or (b) from that data and other information to which we have or are likely to have access.

What information we collectWe may collect information only when you provide it to us by registering/filling out any of our application forms or other web forms on our website. That information can be Name, Gender, Date of Birth, NÂº. ID. Card/Family Book/Passport, Address, Marital Status, Phone, Email, Occupation, and so on.

We use "cookies", where a small data file is sent to your browser to store and track information about you when you access our websites. The cookie is used to improve our products and services and deliver services available on our websites.

heading_content_part: Purpose of use of personal dataWe may collect and use your personal data for any of the following purposes:Provide you with information, products or services you have requestedRespond to your queries and feedback in case you have asked or summited the evaluation forms via our websiteTo support any compliance obligations, any applicable laws or regulations, or assist in law enforcement and investigations conducted by any governmental and/or authority.

decoder_heading: We may disclose your personal data
ident_heading: We may disclose your personal data
heading_content_part: We may disclose your personal data:Where such disclosure is required for performing obligations in the course of or in connection with our provision of the products and services requested by you; orTo third-party service providers, agents, and other organisations, we have performed any functions regarding the purposes as mentioned.

Your rightsThe rights you have regarding the information that stored including:the rights to request us to update your information if it is incorrect or incomplete;in some circumstances, the right to demand us to delete your information, but we may continue to keep your information if we are entitled or required to keep it;

The right to demand us to restrict our processing of your information in some situations. Once there may be cases where you object to or ask us to restrict our processing of your information, but we are entitled to continue processing your information and/or to refuse that request.
Protection of personal data

To safeguard and protect your personal data from unauthorized access, collection, use, disclosure, copying, modification, disposal or similar risks, we implement optimal security protections solution and control measures, including technology with high availability of infrastructures, and complies industry security standards to keep your information safe and secure way. We also required our employee and any third parties who have access to your information or carry out any work on our behalf to abide by appropriate compliance standards to protect any information by applying appropriate security protection mechanisms for the data in process, transmit and at rest.
